src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_0: Becalm fighting emotions.$Fragrant GRASS POKéMON$Soothing aromas make the$body and mind healthy.
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_1: Overwhelm with power!$Craggy ROCK POKéMON$In search of ancient lore,$I travel the world.
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_2: I'm going to try hard!$Good swimmer POKéMON$I wish I could swim without$using an inner tube.
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_3: I don't know. I'll try hard.$WATER POKéMON are buddies.$It's not like I can't swim.$I just like my inner tube.
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_4: We split our duties.$We like friendly POKéMON.$We enjoy POKéMON together$as sister and brother.
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_5: Exploit the foe's weakness.$Balance is crucial.$My goal is to become the$POKéMON CHAMPION.
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_6: Upset the opponent.$Type doesn't matter.$I'm a top student at the$TRAINER'S SCHOOL.
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_7: Slow, steady suffering$Scary to meet at night.$I see things that others$can't see...
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_8: Anything to win.$Gorgeous type!$I have a pool specially for$my POKéMON at home.
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_9: I'll lead you astray.$Cute, of course.$I love the SAFARI ZONE.$I seem to end up there.
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_10: Strategy? Who needs it?$I spent big money on it!$I, being rich, sleep in a$custom POKéMON bed.
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_11: Wrestle down with power.$Took all night to catch...$Big, burly, and buff$POKéMON are the best...
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_12: Ram at full speed!$Funky WATER type!$If I can't be out swimming,$I'll be pumping weights.
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_13: Grand slam pummeling!$FIGHTING type$Not to brag, but I can bust$ten roof tiles!
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_14: I'll electrify you!$They're ELECTRIC!$I want to make people cry$with songs from my heart.
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_15: Burn it all down!$Burn-inducing POKéMON$When you light a campfire,$be sure there's some water.
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_16: Hang in and be tenacious!$I'll raise any POKéMON.$POKéMON raised in the wild$grow strong!
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_17: Our love lets us prevail.$We've had them for years.$Married 50 years, we've$devotedly raised POKéMON.
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_18: Attack in waves!$BUG POKéMON are cool.$I go into the forest every$day to catch BUG POKéMON.
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_19: Daze and confuse!$Ones with weird powers.$I can see through exactly$what you're thinking!
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_20: Battle at full power.$POKéMON of many mysteries$When we spoke, I was really$using telepathy.
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_21: Calm and collected.$POKéMON of distinction$We enjoy a spot of tea$every day. It's imported.
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_22: I use my head to battle.$I love any kind of POKéMON!$My daddy gives me spending$money if I ace a test.
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_23: My knowledge rules!$Any smart POKéMON!$I want to be a POKéMON$researcher in the future.
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_24: We talk it over first.$POKéMON that we both like.$We're senior and junior$students into POKéMON!
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_25: Go for it, my dears!$I have no likes or dislikes.$While out shopping for$supper, I battle too.
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_26: I battle with love!$A POKéMON raised with love!$It's important to build$trust with your POKéMON.
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_27: I see through your moves!$The essence of FIGHTING.$I'm not ready to give way$to the young yet!
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_28: Attack while defending$The FIGHTING type$Being old, I have my own$style of battling.
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_29: I do what I can.$I use different types.$I'm going to keep working$until I beat a GYM LEADER.
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_30: I battle patiently.$WATER POKéMON to battle!$I'm the world's only guy to$catch a huge POKéMON!
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_31: Defense is crucial.$My POKéMON is solid.$I started this for dieting,$but I got right into it.
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_32: Push and push again!$The strength of STEEL$If you're sweating, get$fluids into you regularly.
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_33: Exploit the environment!$All hail the WATER type!$I won't be beaten by some$beach bum SWIMMER!
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_34: All-out offensive!$WATER POKéMON rule!$I must swim over 6 miles$every day.
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_35: Speed above all!$I use a speedy POKéMON.$A marathon is a challenge$against your own self.
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_36: Strike before stricken!$A fast-running POKéMON!$If you ran and ran, you'd$become one with the wind.
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_37: It's about POKéMON power!$See the power of DRAGONS!$I'll become legendary as the$strongest one day!
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_38: I'll show you my technique!$Elegantly wheeling BIRDS$My BIRD POKéMON, deliver my$love to that girl!
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_39: You'll suffer from poison!$Poisonous POKéMON$I undertake training so$that I may become a ninja.
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_40: The first strike wins!$Speedy FIGHTING type$If my POKéMON lose,$I'll carry on the fight!
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_41: Go, go, my POKéMON!$I'll raise anything.$UV rays are your skin's$enemy. Get protected.
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_42: No mercy!$Cute WATER POKéMON$I have too many fans.$I was interviewed on TV.
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_43: I think about this & that.$I like all POKéMON.$What lies beyond that$yonder hill?
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_44: We battle together!$We train together!$We like the same POKéMON,$but different desserts.
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_45: I force things with power!$WATER and FIGHTING types$Seamen are rough spirits!$Any complaints?
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_46: Protect POKéMON from harm.$I love rare POKéMON.$I want to collect all the$world's rare POKéMON.
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_47: I count on power.$POKéMON are my children.$It takes knowledge and$love to raise POKéMON.
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_48: Full-on attack!$Anything. I'll raise it.$I give them {POKEBLOCK}S for$going after CONTEST titles.
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_49: I believe in my POKéMON.$I like strong POKéMON.$I'm training for rescue$work with my POKéMON.
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_50: I attack in waves.$Different types$Those who destroy nature$must never be forgiven!
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_51: I'll show you some guts!$Cute POKéMON are my faves!$After a battle, I always$bathe with my POKéMON.
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_52: Lightning-fast attack!$BUG POKéMON are number 1!$If you want to catch BUG$POKéMON, wake up early.
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_53: I battle with power.$Hard-bodied POKéMON$I've been planning a month$for today's hike.
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_55: We let it all hang out.$The 1st POKéMON I caught.$POKéMON and I have grown$stronger together.
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_56: ROCK-type power attack$Rock-solid types are good.$Through battling, I want to$learn all about POKéMON.
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_57: Direct physical action!$FIGHTING POKéMON rule!$The world awaits me as the$next big wave!
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_58: I choose to electrify.$Get shocked by electricity!$Wahahahaha! The secret to$health is laughter!
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_59: Battle aggressively.$Burn with passion!$Wash away daily fatigue in$hot springs completely!
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_60: I flexibly adapt my style.$Grown in a balanced manner.$POKéMON are my life.$My chosen path is harsh...
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_61: I take advantage of speed.$Graceful sky dancers$I can see the ebb and flow$of the winds.
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_62: We battle in cooperation.$Always friendly POKéMON.$We understand each other,$and we understand others.
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_63: Dignity and respect$I prefer POKéMON of grace.$Aquatic illusions best suit$my distinctive elegance.
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_64: Offense over defense$The DARK side's beauties$You can talk all you want -$might is right!
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_65: Confuse and confound$There's nothing definite.$I wonder how my grandma at$MT. PYRE is doing?
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_66: I use items for help.$Flaming passion in icy cold!$The ICE type can be better$trained in this hot land.
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_67: Harness strong abilities.$The raw power of DRAGONS!$I live to battle every day$to learn about POKéMON.
src_data_text_trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_68: Pick on the foe's weakness.$The ultimate STEEL POKéMON$When it comes down to it,$I'm still the strongest!
